restaurants.name: Le Gecko
restaurants.ambience: Warm and welcoming environment with traditional Polynesian motifs, lush greenery and azure waters
highlights: Captures essence of Bora Bora's vibrant culture
source_files: French Polynesia/French Polynesia All Inclusive Guide - Apeksha and Nitin.pdf

restaurants.name: Bora Bora Yacht Club
restaurants.ambience: Chilled-out atmosphere with open air deck setting and fabulous lagoon views
must_try_dishes: Tahitian Marinated Raw Tuna Salad with Coconut Milk
source_files: French Polynesia/French Polynesia All Inclusive Guide - Apeksha and Nitin.pdf

restaurants.name: The St. James
restaurants.ambience: Overlooks the lagoon providing picturesque setting, lagoon-side bar, great place to spot rays
highlights: Mainly seafood menu cooked French style
source_files: French Polynesia/French Polynesia All Inclusive Guide - Apeksha and Nitin.pdf

restaurants.name: Iaorana Gelato Homemade Italian Ice Cream
highlights: Wide variety of flavours including classic and tropical options
source_files: French Polynesia/French Polynesia All Inclusive Guide - Apeksha and Nitin.pdf

restaurants.name: Bora Healthy
restaurants.hours: 10:00 am – 02:00 pm; 06:00 pm – 09:00 pm; closed on saturday
highlights: Variety of American and local dishes
Burgers, sandwiches, salads, seafood, wraps and paninis
source_files: French Polynesia/French Polynesia All Inclusive Guide - Apeksha and Nitin.pdf
